case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK VS. BENN ANIMA et al

docket_entries.description: PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR OF JUN-02-2004, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION FILED (SWEEP)
